feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Auto Update of Contract End Date if EoE is performed earlier
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement to auto-adjust contract end date if termination is performed before contract end date to avoid alert message (which has already been generated in the system).
I have put a message (to manually delete alert) to inform admin that there is future contract end date when termination is performed for the user.

Need your advice to auto-adjust contract end date at time of termination.

Thanks and Regards,

entry.title: An application error occurred. Please try again later, or notify support if the issue keeps occurrin
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community!
So I'm new to this SAP learning hub and have been following the learning journey for SAP THR81/ SuccessFactors EC in my practice instance.

What I've observed is that every time I try to follow any assignment related to imports, I get this error- An application error occurred. Please try again later, or notify support if the issue keeps occurring.

This same error poppped in Provisioning while I was trying to upload Corporate and CSF CDM, now  tried to import a location using import foundation data and the same error is there. I know for the fact that if there's anything wronhg with my values input, it would throw different kinds of errors, which need to be analyzed but this seems to be with the product/ practice instance.

Has anybody dealt with such a thing before? Any suggestions that might help resolve are welcome 🙂

entry.title: How can I set the Matrix Relationship Section in Position Creation a non mandatory?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I would really appreciate your opinion on this issue.

I want to make the matrix relationship section optional in position creation.

I verified the association between the Position and PositionMatrixRelationship objects, and it is not mandatory.

I also tried setting the two fields (relatedPosition and matrixRelationshipType) in the PositionMatrixRelationship object as non-mandatory, but this error was triggered.

Additionally, while reviewing the standard configuration required, I noticed that I applied the same approach, yet normally it shouldn't block position creation when the matrix relationship is not filled in.

Do you have any insights into this issue? Your help is very much appreciated.

Best regards,

entry.title: SuccessFactors API language
entry.content:
Hi,

I've been scratching my head for a moment already. Is there a way to pass the language as a parameter or a header so the API would return the localized value in the given language ?

Say I have an API user whom default language is English (en_GB) and I'd like to get countries (Country) with the externalName_localized in French, is there any way ?

I tried the following:

  • sap-locale
  • sapml-language
  • localization
  • locale
  • sap-language
  • Accept-Language
  • Content-Language

None of the parameters or headers (for the last 2) worked.

The only way to get the data from the API in French is to change the default language in SuccessFactors directly, which is clearly not the intent.

entry.title: Compensation Statement integration with FileNet using SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We have a client requesting Compensation Statement integration with FileNet using SAP CPI. 

Do you know if this is possible? And if not, could you suggest a workaround.

Best Regards,
Pavan

SAP SuccessFactors Compensation  SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central  SAP Integration Suite 

 

 

 

 

#

entry.title: Workflow should trigger basis on another MDF Object
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement where, upon submission of a custom MDF object by a user, we need to trigger a workflow for another custom MDF object that serves as a feedback object. I'm looking for ways to achieve this, such as using intelligent services, CPI, or exploring other workarounds.

entry.title: Restrict pay statement access
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community

Is there a way to restrict payroll statements from being displayed or synchronized to EC in the following scenarios?
1. Restrict while preparing and loading payroll information or make it visible until the payroll is finalized
2. Do not show payroll statements for TRM termination payrolls.
3. Special payrolls until finalized

entry.title: Using IPS to create a predictable password for non-SSO Users in IAS for SF?
entry.content:
Hello, I have a question about possibilities of using IPS to set large amounts of default passwords on an ongoing basis.

With many companies starting the mandatory migration to IAS/IPS for SuccessFactors, we are finding more that have large populations of "PWD" Password users with no real emails that still need to access the system. 

With CIS in place the mechanism to update passwords has moved to IAS and not in SF anymore where the old mass import tools are no longer applicable for an HR Admin to use.

If we need to update more than 50, 100, 300 passwords, how is this achievable realistically? IPS method for setting default passwords for all newly synced users would be the ideal process for the business over an outside API call or file import done every so often but concessions can be made. 

It seems file-based export of existing synced users and re-import CSV with an initial password I setup in a column does not work (anymore?). This was the "old" method available in SF and used by many that would now be gone switching to IAS. You could control the predictable password this way and pass them out per employee. 

We have reviewed the documentation and seems the most promising as it doesn't need an HR Admin to manually interfere and only follow a business process with rules you set in the transformations, but the rules are limited currently:
Set Up Default Passwords Using Transformations | SAP Help Portal

The last portion of this document is incomplete/inaccurate. It gives a title of "combining" fields and then only gives one field example. 

The other examples for a "predictable password" might work for some companies, to set it to their Employee ID but that could be risky to onboard 100s of password users and tell them their password is their Employee ID. At the moment our only consideration is trying to combine 2 of the fields and concat into their password field like FirstName+LastName or more fields, or something unique to the employee as possible, but even this does not completely pass security standards.

 

Is this currently the best or only option for automating the process for bringing in Password users? Whatever method we choose, the HR Admins/business still has to communicate to the user how to login, with what user, what password and build their job aids. 

The note 3001615 - How to mass update user password in Identity Authentication, seems incomplete as it says to use one API and then mentions it is deprecated and to explore the business hub to build your own API call from Postman. This is not exactly something I can hand an HR Admin as a replacement for what they could previously do in SF. 


Thanks for any input I appreciate all opinions on this discussion.

entry.title: Does the partner edge indicate when a workbook was last updated for all SF modules?
entry.content:
Hi,

How do we track updated workbook from SAP? Does the Partner Edge indicate when a workbook was last updated? It appears that it does not, as no time and date are mentioned against the implementation workbook. There is no date in the workbook, making it difficult to track updates on the latest version.

Additionally, Is there a way to view the list of available workbooks in SAP SuccessFactors for all modules at one page to review?

Thanks

entry.title: Integration Center - DynamicGroupDefinition - No Data
entry.content:
Hello,

in Platform Feature Settings I have enabled the flag 'Enable Dynamic Group Definition Report' and executed OData API Metadata Refresh.

I am trying to create a report using Integration Center and using the DynamicGroupDefinition - have not done anything fancy in the report, just selected all the fields and getting a 'No Data' in the 'Configure Fields'?

I am assigned within 'Manage Role-Based Permission Access' and I have added myself to the API role (I also have the Super Admin role).

I executed the same steps for another client and I was able to see the details of the Permission Groups - what am I missing? 

Thanks in advance for any help you can provide,

Kind regards,

Cristiana

entry.title: Instance Refresh from SF Prod to Test- IPSADMIN admin not found
entry.content:
Hello Everyone-

One small question in Instance Refresh-- I am doing a copy from Prod- Test systems and in Both systems SSO through IAS is enabled.
ASs per KBA- https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/E/2954491
when both systems have IAS enabled, WE need to reset same password for IPSADMIN
However in SF Prod system i dont see a IPSADMIN user,.
Please let me know as how can i solve this problem. ?
If i dont reset the same password for IPSADSMIN in SF Test & Prod will there be any impact?

entry.title: Termination screen attachment mandatory issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

We have a scenario where employee terminates voluntarily by providing termination reason in termination screen at this time attachment section is mandatory but when manager sent back the request the attachment section becomes non mandatory what are the possible ways to fix the issue.Kindly help.

 

Regards

Anu

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Time Management: Projects / Implementations
entry.content:
Dear SAP World,

I have a question regarding SuccessFactors Time Management (Time Off, Time Sheet and Time Tracking).

Unfortunately, I cannot find any experiences / showstoppers / typical problems and successes regarding the implementation of SuccessFactors Time Management for larger companies.

Do you have such blogs or can you report on this please?

Particular interest is for companies that operate in more than 30+ countries and also have many blue collar workers.
However, I am open to any experiences. Thank you!

entry.title: How to use a single position for multiple employees?
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

The FTE within a position is set to 2, however, while assigning the position to the second employee the error relating to the position being occupied is thrown. Please suggest steps to be taken for us to use the position against of 2 employees.

entry.title: SAP SFSF Integration Center
entry.content:
Hello all,
Greetings!

In the SAP SFSF integration center, what is the web service we can consume that list employee data and provides employee status via API?

Regards,
Hayery Ribeiro

entry.title: SAP Successfactors National ID Section to be mandatory in Employee Central and onboarding 2.O
entry.content:
Can we make the National ID Section mandatory, also bank details in Candidate onboarding 2.O in personal data collection step in successfactors.

So, the details can be flown in Employee Central.

entry.title: Annualized Salary (custom field) is not automatically populating for Pay Component: Hourly
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

@xavierlegarrec 

We have an Annualized Salary (custom field)

This field is not automatically populating based on the Hourly Rate in the New Hire Screen.

Please note the trace below:

The expression 'payComponentRecurringModel.employmentInfoModel.jobInfoModel.jobInfo_standard_hours.value' is considered to be NULL, as the property 'employmentInfoModel' of 'payComponentRecurringModel' is found to be NULL at 'payComponentRecurringModel.employmentInfoModel'.
 

It seems like the path to get the Standard Weekly hours is incorrect? Please assist

 

Any assistance will be appreciated.

 

Thank you!

Ashlin

entry.title: SAP SF EC Time Management
entry.content:
Hi ,

In the Work Schedule object, we have 3 types of models: simple, period, and schedule. What do they mean, and in what situations do we use them? 

I went through the implementation guide, but it's not detailed there.

Please explain with a suitable example.

Thank you.

entry.title: ADP and EC Integration using ADP Workforce Now
entry.content:
One of my client's USA-based subsidiary implemented ADP Workforce Now as its HCM solution last year. As a result, they plan to establish data integration between ADP and SAP SuccessFactors (SFs) this year.

There is already an API available for data integration between ADP and SFs, which appears to facilitate this process:
ADP Workforce Now - SAP SuccessFactors Integration

Request any information:
Could you introduce us to any case studies of other companies that have built data integration between ADP Workforce Now and SFs using the above API? Specifically, we would like to understand the following:

  • Detailed API specifications and the configuration tasks required on both the ADP and SFs sides.
  • Estimated costs and project timeline for the integration.
  • Potential concerns or challenges associated with the integration.

Appreciate any insights on this topics. Thanks!

entry.title: "Total Team Size" in Story Reports
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Kindly assist to pull "Total Team Size" (not direct reports) in Story Reports.

Thanks and Regards
